summary: Patient profile clarity and PHI compliance improvements, alongside fixes for saved-view reliability, notification routing, and support program display.

updates.title: Support Programs in Patient Header
updates.body: The patient profile header now shows a patient's active support programs as chips, with quick access to program details.

updates.title: Status History Timestamps
updates.body: Status history now shows the time of day for each status, and a patient's latest status reflects the actual status date.

updates.title: Default Newest-First Sorting
updates.body: Status History and Shipments & Infusions now default to most-recent-first.

updates.title: Saved Views Retained
updates.body: Saved-view filters and column order now persist when navigating back or editing records.

updates.title: PHI Protection
updates.body: The FRM role can no longer create or edit Task descriptions containing protected health information.

updates.title: Inquiry Notifications
updates.body: Users without Patient Tracking access can now open an inquiry from its notification without hitting an error.

updates.title: Patient Update Stability
updates.body: Resolved an error when updating a patient record that has no date of birth.

updates.title: Support Programs
updates.body: Fixed an issue where support programs with past expiration dates were not appearing in the table after creation.

updates.title: Inquiry List Masking
updates.body: SP Patient ID masking is now correctly applied for non-consented patients in the Watchtower Patient Inquiries list.
